SEARCH
Module jtamaro

Package jtamaro.graphic

package jtamaro.graphic
JTamaro graphics.
  • Graphics: operations for working with graphics
  • Colors: pre-defined colors and methods to create custom colors
  • Points: pre-defined pin points
  • Class
    Description
    Above
    A graphic composed by placing the two graphics one above the other.
    Beside
    A graphic composed by placing the two graphics one besides the other.
    CartesianWorld
    A CartesianWorld can be used to place Graphics at specific positions in a Cartesian coordinate system.
    CircularSector
    A circular sector belonging to a circle of the given radius, filled with a color.
    Color
    Represents a color.
    Colors
    Static methods for working with Colors, and static fields for well-known Colors.
    Compose
    A graphic that composes the two provided graphics.
    Ellipse
    An ellipse with the given width and height, filled with a color.
    EmptyGraphic
    An empty graphic.
    Fonts
    Static fields for well-known fonts.
    Graphic
    A graphic (image) with a position for pinning.
    Graphics
    Static methods for working with graphics.
    Overlay
    A graphic composed by overlaying the two provided graphics, keeping the first one in the foreground and the second one in background.
    Pin
    A graphic that corresponds to a provided graphic, with a new pinning position.
    Point
    A Point in a Graphic.
    Points
    Names of notable points, that can be used as pinning positions for a graphic.
    Rectangle
    A rectangle of the given size, filled with a color.
    Rotate
    A new graphic that rotates counterclockwise a provided graphic around its pinning position by the given angle.
    Text
    A graphic with the text rendered using the specified font, size and color.
    Triangle
    A triangle with two sides and the angle between them, filled with a color.
